revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[ja:Category:1908年の日本]] [[az:Category:1908-ci ildə Yaponiya]] [[commons:Category:1908 in Japan]] [[eo:Category:1908 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1908]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۰۸ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1908 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1908 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1908]] [[ko:Category:1908년 일본]] [[ku:Category:1908 li Japonê]] [[ru:Category:1908 год в Японии]] [[tr:Category:1908'de Japonya]] [[uk:Category:1908 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:1908ء میں جاپان]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1908]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1908 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1908年日本]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Imperial Household Rites Act]].

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1908_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
